category_sources: source_facts.description says Lightweight open framework for Java (Jakarta EE 8); official Open Liberty repository describes a composable application server runtime.

repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; verified OpenLiberty GitHub organization pins open-liberty as the public source repository for the Open Liberty runtime.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Java and Jakarta EE 8; official Open Liberty README describes a cloud-native Java microservices runtime with Java EE/MicroProfile features.
